description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image and define variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS=28.0.3, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK=28, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS=4333796. Add a global before_script that updates apt, installs wget unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, downloads the Android SDK tools zip for the given ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS version, extracts it, creates license files with the required hashes, runs sdkmanager --update and installs the platforms;android-${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK}, build-tools;${ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS}, extras;google;m2repository and extras;android;m2repository, then exports ANDROID_HOME, updates PATH, and makes gradlew executable. Define a test stage with a unitTests job that runs ./gradlew test. Define a build stage with a build job that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug and ./gradlew assembleRelease and publishes the app/build/outputs/ directory as an artifact. The pipeline has no special rules, caches, services, or deployment targets.
